name: Pong 1K 2P (NES homebrew)
notes: Addresses found empirically 2026-06-06 by RAM-diffing over the NCI on the live GOSE VM (READ_CORE_RAM; NES achievement space = CPU $0000-$07FF identity), then VERIFIED against the rendered score display + a 5Hz RAM log across a full played match. Game ends when a score hits 9; at game-over the ball freezes - send NCI RESET then tap start for a new match. paddle_y fields are the paddle's TOP edge; paddles are 0x20 tall (4 sprites, P1 OAM Y at $0278/$027C/$0280/$0284). Ball OAM shadow: Y=$0298, X=$029B. $0000 = frame counter/RNG (always changing - liveness check). P1 = joypad index 0 = LEFT paddle. $16 is ball speed/serve param (1-4), NOT a score - early drafts mislabeled $15/$16 as the scores.
